Call ID: EXT-003
Type: external
Date: 2026-01-19
Topic: Adoption & Onboarding
Participants: Elena (account manager); Carlos (customer)
------------------------------------------------------------
AM (Elena): Hi Carlos, thanks for making time today. How are things going on your side?
Customer (Carlos): Only a handful of our users are logging in regularly.
AM (Elena): Let's look at the usage data and find where people drop off.
Customer (Carlos): We've had a mixed experience, to be candid.
AM (Elena): We have an onboarding track that could help your new hires ramp faster.
Customer (Carlos): I feel better about the direction. Let's check in again soon.
AM (Elena): Thank you — I'll send a recap with clear next steps and owners by end of day.
